results.title: Samay Raina's Latent Smashes Records — 38.5M Views Beats Dhurandhar
results.description: Samay Raina's 'India's Got Latent' has officially surpassed Biswa Kalyan Rath's 'Dhurandhar', crossing 38.5 million views.

results.title: Indian bowler Gurnoor Brar found guilty of breaching ICC Code of Conduct
results.description: India bowler Gurnoor Brar has been given a warning for breaching level one of the ICC Code of Conduct during the first ODI against England in Birmingham on July 14, 2026. Brar was found to have breached Article 2.9 of the ICC Code of Conduct for Players and Player Support Personnel, which relates to “throwing [...]

results.title: I found smart CCTV cameras that send live alerts straight to your phone before it's too late
results.description: Stopp opening CCTV apps every few minutes after switching to these smart cameras. Their instant phone alerts keep me updated about movement, visitors, deliveries and unexpected activity wherever I am.
